videos.headline: Matthew Golden scores his 2nd TD for Texas
videos.description: Quinn Ewers finds Matthew Golden in the end zone to increase Texas' lead 20-10.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Matthew Golden scores his 2nd TD for Texas) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas picks off Arkansas' Taylen Green on deflected pass
videos.description: Taylen Green is intercepted by Jahdae Barron as Texas gets the ball back.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas picks off Arkansas' Taylen Green on deflected pass) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas strikes first as Matthew Golden is left wide open for a TD
videos.description: Quinn Ewers airs out a 20-yard touchdown pass to Matthew Golden to put Texas on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas strikes first as Matthew Golden is left wide open for a TD) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arkansas' Devin Bale botches punt for 8 yards
videos.description: Arkansas' struggles continue with an 8-yard botched punt from Devin Bale to give Texas good field position.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arkansas' Devin Bale botches punt for 8 yards) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jahdae Barron picks up Texas' 4th sack before halftime
videos.description: Jahdae Barron cuts through the defense to sack Arkansas's Taylen Green before halftime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jahdae Barron picks up Texas' 4th sack before halftime) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ja'Quinden Jackson powers into the end zone for Arkansas first TD
videos.description: Ja'Quinden Jackson breathes life into Arkansas after capping off an impressive drive to cut into Texas' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ja'Quinden Jackson powers into the end zone for Arkansas first TD) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas's Alfred Collins forces the Arkansas fumble
videos.description: Alfred Collins punches the football out of CJ Brown's hand for a Texas recovery.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas's Alfred Collins forces the Arkansas fumble) 2024/11/16 ESHEET
